IDENTITY: Candidate Profile (18752129.pdf)
SUMMARY: To pursue a caring and creative career, applying existing knowledge, acquiring new skills, contributing to the future of children.
SKILLS: Creating a warm classroom environment, Supportive guidance for students, Encouraging self-discovery and understanding of curriculum, Balancing social, emotional, physical and intellectual development, Developing trust, support, and love between teacher and child, Promoting emotional development through exploration, Encouraging outdoor activities, Healthy meal planning

DESCRIPTION: Believes in creating a warm, organized classroom environment that fosters social, emotional, physical and intellectual development. Emphasizes the importance of being a supportive guide for students to explore self-discovery and understand curriculum.
